channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Holgado and Joan Mir set to join Gresini MotoGP line-up from 2027
item.description: Gresini Racing has confirmed a significant reshuffle of its MotoGP rider line-up for the 2027 season, announcing the arrival of rising Spanish talent Daniel Holgado alongside former world champion Joa...

item.title: Central Bank of Nigeria Revokes Operating Licences of 46 Microfinance Banks Over Regulatory Failures
item.description: My people, the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) under Governor Olayemi Cardoso has taken strong action by revoking the operating licences of 46 microfinance banks across the country with effect from July...

item.title: Fox Business panel reacts to weaker-than-expected U.S. jobs report and economic revisions
item.description: A Fox Business broadcast discussed newly released U.S. labor market data that came in weaker than analysts had expected, sparking concern among commentators and guests. According to the report, the ec...

item.title: Federal High Court introduces weekend filing system for pre-election cases ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: The Federal High Court (FHC) in Nigeria has introduced a new Practice Direction that allows the filing of pre-election cases on weekends and public holidays as part of efforts to fast-track electoral ...

item.title: Concerns Over Withheld Voting Machine Security Report and Potential Election Interference in 2026 Midterms
item.description: In this opinion piece, progressive commentator Thom Hartmann discusses a federal intelligence report on voting machine security that the White House has allegedly withheld ahead of the 2026 midterms. ...

item.title: Jen Psaki Points to Timing of Trump's Stock Purchases Around Tariff Policy Announcements
item.description: In a recent segment on MS NOW, former White House Press Secretary Jen Psaki discussed revelations from President Donald Trump's extensive financial disclosure documents. Psaki highlighted stock trades...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif to undertake official visits to Iran and Turkiye from July 3–5
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif is scheduled to visit Iran and Turkiye from July 3 to July 5, as confirmed by the Foreign Office spokesperson Tahir Andrabi during a weekly media briefing. The visit will...

item.title: Iowa GOP lieutenant governor candidate denies link to Adult Friend Finder email account after data breach report
item.description: A married Iowa Republican running for lieutenant governor has denied any involvement with an alleged Adult Friend Finder account tied to his email address following a reported data breach disclosure. ...

item.title: Norovirus outbreak affects over 120 passengers on Princess Cruises ship Ruby Princess
item.description: More than 120 people became ill aboard the Princess Cruises ship Ruby Princess during a round-trip voyage from San Francisco to Alaska and Canada, according to the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and...

item.title: Trump posts AI-generated video portraying himself as a doctor promoting prayers and Diet Coke
item.description: President Donald Trump sparked renewed controversy after posting an AI-generated video on Truth Social shortly before midnight, depicting himself as a fictional medical doctor. In the video, the AI ve...

item.title: Alleged Russian drone surveillance campaign targeted nuclear and military sites across Europe
item.description: Intelligence researchers have alleged that Russia conducted an extensive surveillance operation using drones to monitor sensitive nuclear and military sites across Europe, including locations in the U...

item.title: Elizade JAC Motors and Lotus Bank introduce zero down payment bus financing for schools in Nigeria
item.description: A new financing programme has been launched in Nigeria to help primary, secondary, and tertiary institutions acquire 13-seater and 18-seater buses without making any initial down payment. The scheme i...

item.title: Increase in orca sightings off Northumberland coast linked to possible ecosystem recovery
item.description: Recent reports from the Northumberland coast in north-east England indicate a noticeable rise in sightings of orcas, with wildlife observers and boat tour operators recording more frequent and closer ...

item.title: Greek Orthodox priest gains cult following with experimental doom metal and electronic album
item.description: Father Dionysios Tabakis, a Greek Orthodox priest based in Nafplio, has gained unexpected international attention after releasing an experimental album blending doom metal, Byzantine chant, Christmas ...

item.title: Republican rural lawmakers resist expanded mail-voting restrictions in Trump-backed election bill
item.description: President Donald Trump’s push to advance an expanded version of the SAVE America Act is encountering significant resistance within his own party, particularly from Republican lawmakers representing ru...

item.title: The Summer of Ludd Festival Promotes Offline Living and Critiques Big Tech Culture
item.description: The article explores the “Summer of Ludd,” a weeklong festival held in New York City’s East Village that encourages participants to disconnect from digital technology and rethink their dependence on B...

item.title: Government explores legal options to deport Rochdale grooming gang leader amid release concerns
item.description: A UK government minister has stated that officials are examining all possible legal routes to deport Shabir Ahmed, the convicted leader of a Rochdale grooming gang, following concerns over his imminen...

item.title: Matt Bellamy reflects on 2000s guitar rock era and meeting Jack White and Albert Hammond Jr
item.description: Muse frontman Matt Bellamy has reflected on the 2000s guitar rock landscape and his band’s place within it during a recent interview with NME. Speaking around the release of Muse’s tenth studio album,...

item.title: Anderson Cooper Highlights Trump's Contradictory Statements on Foreign Gifts and Air Force One Controversy
item.description: CNN anchor Anderson Cooper highlighted what he described as a contradiction between Donald Trump’s past statements and his current position regarding foreign gifts, focusing on a controversy involving...

item.title: Ombudsman: Plunder and Related Charges Against Senator Marcoleta Moving Forward Over Undeclared Donations
item.description: Assistant Ombudsman Mico Clavano confirmed that the filing of plunder and other related charges against Senator Rodante Marcoleta and three other individuals is progressing as scheduled. The cases ste...
